query:
-- 查询所有重庆城市的合伙人记录
SELECT 
  p.id as partnerId,
  p.userId,
  p.name as partnerName,
  p.phone as partnerPhone,
  p.isActive as partnerIsActive,
  pc.id as partnerCityId,
  pc.cityId,
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.contractStatus,
  u.id as userId,
  u.name as userName,
  u.phone as userPhone
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON pc.partnerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cities c ON c.id = pc.cityId
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = p.userId
WHERE c.name = '重庆' OR p.name LIKE '%重庆%' OR p.name LIKE '%test%'
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC;
